heading: This isn't guesswork — it's a system.
subtext: 9 proprietary frameworks give you a repeatable, data-driven system for making property decisions.

frameworks.title: Property X-Ray
frameworks.description: Scores any condo across 11 weighted factors. Entry pricing and exit audience carry 80% of the decision.

frameworks.title: Price Gap Analysis
frameworks.description: Identifies investable pricing gaps between new launches and comparable resale projects.

frameworks.title: Exit Audience Test
frameworks.description: Validates real buyer demand through transaction data, not narratives. No proven audience = weak investment.

frameworks.title: The 50% Rule
frameworks.description: Only restructure a portfolio if the move increases total value by 50%+, accounting for transaction costs.
